title: CSV uploads from Excel/Windows rejected with 415 at POST /api/imports
product_summary: Acme Importer - bulk CSV/JSON import API (Node/Express)

ground_truth.root_cause: isAllowedUpload() in src/validation.js whitelist-matches the content-type header with an exact string comparison against ['text/csv', 'application/json', 'text/plain'], so Windows/Excel CSV uploads (application/vnd.ms-excel) and any type carrying a parameter (text/csv;charset=utf-8) fail validation and POST /api/imports returns 415 for valid CSV files.
ground_truth.fix_contract: POST /api/imports must accept CSV uploads sent as application/vnd.ms-excel (with a .csv filename) and as text/csv with a charset parameter, returning 201 and queuing the import; genuinely disallowed types such as text/html (with or without a charset parameter) and empty content types must still be rejected with 415 and not queued.
expected_evidence: import_rejected events whose content_type property is application/vnd.ms-excel with .csv filenames
the import_uploaded -> import_processed funnel staying healthy for text/csv uploads, showing the parser itself is fine
distractors: the CSV parser in src/processor.js (never reached; rejection happens at validation before parsing)
client-side tooling of the reporting integrator (macOS uploads of the same files succeed)
